creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I looked at this a bit.  For whatever reason, growfs is triggering a DMA transfer of length 512 on a buffer that is not cacheline size-aligned.  Because both the beginning and end of the buffer address range are not cacheline size-aligned, the loop in _bus_dmamap_count_pages() concludes that it needs 2 pages in order to bounce the request, but clearly that's not true since the entire request is only 512 bytes.
